title: pouteria campechiana
intro: Pouteria campechiana, also known as the sapote or sapodilla tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Central America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pouteria campechiana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the sapote tree include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from its leaves, bark, and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
